scripts.build: bun run --filter @nodrix/web build && bun run --filter @nodrix/worker build
scripts.deploy:platform: bun run build && bun run --filter @nodrix/worker deploy

BETTER_AUTH_SECRET.description:
Random 32+ byte string used to sign session cookies. Generate one with:

`openssl rand -base64 32`

Then paste the output here. **This value is stored as a KMS-encrypted Workers Secret** and cannot be changed without invalidating existing sessions.
